description_long: This sconce features a rectangular, dark-colored ceiling mount from which three cylindrical pendant lights are suspended by thin, black cords. Each pendant consists of a two-tone cylinder, with the upper portion in a dark metallic or black finish and the lower portion in a lighter, metallic or brushed steel color. The pendants are evenly spaced and hang at the same length, creating a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing function and form. The fixture is likely intended for ceiling mounting, providing focused downward lighting. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or modern public spaces.
description: A modern ceiling-mounted sconce with three cylindrical pendant lights suspended from a rectangular base, featuring a two-tone metallic finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pendant lights evenly spaced and the rectangular ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the rectangular mount and the staggered alignment of the pendants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cords' attachment points and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the fixture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pendant arrangement and the subtle color contrast between the upper and lower sections.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and a two-tone metallic finish. Its geometric form and lack of ornamentation give it a contemporary, urban appeal.
